NFC: maneuverings and equity

Business
By Kaiser Bengali
May 30, 2020

The 10th NFC constituted – Terms Reference (ToRs) of commission set off roaring controversy

The 10th NFC has been constituted, and the Terms of Reference (ToRs) of the commission have set off a roaring controversy. There are controversies aplenty; however, this one could be highly costly for the country’s political health and may threaten to undermine the foundations of the federation.

One issue with the 10th NFC ToRs is the commission’s composition. The NFC is a constitutional body, with the composition of its membership specified in the constitution.

The 10th NFC can negotiate vertical sharing ratio anywhere present 42.5:57.5 and the "no-gain-no-loss" 37.5:62.5.

Advertisement
